label: Dataset
comment: A dataset produced by a home cage monitoring experiment.

label: VCG-Ready Dataset
comment: A dataset that carries the complete metadata required for Virtual Control Group (VCG) reuse.

label: Home Cage Experiment
comment: An experiment conducted using a home cage monitoring system.

label: Animal Cohort
comment: A group of animals sharing species, strain and experimental conditions.

label: Home Cage System
comment: A hardware/software platform used to monitor animals in their home cage.

label: Behavioral Metric
comment: A measurable behavioral readout (e.g. distance travelled, sleep bouts).

label: has experiment
comment: Relates a dataset to the experiment that produced it.

label: has dataset
comment: Relates an experiment to a dataset it produced.

label: uses system
comment: Relates an experiment to the home cage system it uses.

label: has cohort
comment: Relates an experiment to an animal cohort it studies.

label: measures metric
comment: Relates an experiment to a behavioral metric it measures.

label: title
comment: Human-readable title.

label: identifier
comment: A persistent identifier or accession.

label: species
comment: Species of the animals in a cohort.

label: strain
comment: Strain of the animals in a cohort.

label: sample size
comment: Number of animals in a cohort.

label: duration (days)
comment: Duration of an experiment in days.

label: metric name
comment: Name of a behavioral metric.

label: metric unit
comment: Unit of measurement of a behavioral metric.

label: system name
comment: Name of a home cage system.

label: vendor
comment: Vendor or manufacturer of a home cage system.
